description: Chronological index of memory nodes for time-based queries

timeline.summary: Built Graph Memory skill for Agent Zero - a unified memory mosaic that creates blockchain-like memory nodes across all agents. Designed for spatial awareness of work progress, file connections, and project state.

Built complete Graph Memory skill with A2A cross-integration documentation. Created installable zip package (graph-memory-skill.zip) for public sharing. System provides spatial memory for multi-project management with blockchain-like memory nodes.
